{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231631323AC23FDCF64DAEB171AB"}"},"total":32},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607046667162370840","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，有点短和谜语人。
其实我不太喜欢扮演模板，我更倾向于只有模板实力，不用扮演。（虽然这个只能算半扮演）
就像文中说的一样，扮演之后还是自己吗？哪怕是前世或者其他关联，但还是有的别扭。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771155569,"group_id":"7587239751019678782","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"努力挣学时，参加活动中……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/TX6rziS2TrWn8wchTik3m+iPXCKh6DTKQolTZ1+Rli","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aededee7c44d424da48c6820642ccaeb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795532&x-signature=Y0UQrP4LtQW1UpWyhu24hQBew08%3D","user_id":"2643688060357022","user_name":"纪阳的王瑶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2643688060357022","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587239751019678782","book_info":{"abstract":"“此时境外邪神并起，我虽无意逐鹿，却知苍生苦楚"
这是让所有守夜人都激动地起鸡皮疙瘩的话，苍南神战时人类再也不是被动防守
“我为大夏岩神，诛邪为我本分，其他邪神休的再扰大夏清净。”
史上最有安全感的男人，每次只要墨离在场，那么所有的危险就将不复存在
对守夜人来说，当你听到“固若金汤”时，那么你就绝对安全了
“墨离我准备让你来当总司令。"
“可以”
一年后
“总司令遇难，封锁全场！”
而一旁一个和总司令名字长相的一样的人，坐在136小队旁边。
“你小子，就算不想干了，就直接找七夜嘛。搞这么一出不得把那些高层吓死。”
“只有这样，有些人才会出来。”墨离默默地看向月球，在所有人都没注意时离开了","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e150cb0818c40ceee7b233af6edb9fd1","author":"清萧易风","author_id":"","book_id":"7587239751019678782","book_name":"斩神我为摩拉克斯，华夏的岩神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582010","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6283人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595562979886629438","read_count":"6283","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"150941"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"65","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/195d16dd1e793b8b1daf4c10fdda07d1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438692&x-signature=zO9ATfvWMOTFEVQLHPk2eqS%2BxE8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1125490475407117","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231631323AC23FDCF64DAEB171AB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwa
